'''Tanc mites''' were [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to the jungle [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Characteristics==
These creatures had six legs, two arms that ended in claws and two antennae. Tanc mite hives were ruled by a queen.<ref name="SWG" /> Tanc mites wre scavengers eating carrion. They were covered with a rock-hard shell that protects against electricity, fire, and most physical damage.<ref name="SWG:TM" />

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a small population of tanc mites populated the atrium of [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nos'lyn]] tasked an aspiring Jedi to eliminate these tanc mites in order to train him to fight in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="SWG:LtWotF">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Jedi|Learning the Ways of the Force|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>
